info.title: SPMResolver - Swift Package to XCFramework Resolver
info.description: A .NET CLI tool that resolves Swift Package Manager dependencies and exports XCFramework outputs for .NET MAUI / macios binding workflows.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Build Swift package library products into XCFrameworks.

options.name: --package-path
options.description: Path to a local Swift package directory or Package.swift file.

options.name: --package-url
options.description: Remote git URL of the Swift package to clone and resolve.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output folder where generated XCFrameworks are exported.

options.name: --keep-temporary-workspace
options.description: Keep the temporary working directory after execution for debugging. [default: False]

options.name: --disable-release-asset-lookup
options.description: Disable checking for pre-built XCFrameworks in GitHub Releases. [default: False]
